hero.subheadline: Senior Full-Stack Engineer & AI Architect. I help CTOs and technical founders design distributed systems, build production AI features — LangGraph agents, RAG pipelines, ML ensembles — and ship products that compound. 6+ years at enterprise scale, from microservices to multi-agent AI.

positioning.description: I work across the full stack — from system architecture to AI features in production. Whether it's designing a backend, building an AI copilot, or helping a team ship faster, I focus on solving the actual problem with the simplest approach that works.

ai.title: AI Agents, RAG Pipelines & Intelligent Products
ai.description: Production AI systems, not prototypes. LangGraph multi-agent architectures, RAG pipelines with vector search, AI copilots with tool-calling, recommendation engines, ML model ensembles, and structured LLM outputs.

architecture.title: Architecture Consulting
architecture.description: Designing the right architecture for your problem — not the most complex one. Monoliths when they make sense, microservices when they don't, and the pragmatic middle ground most teams actually need.

product.title: Product Engineering
product.description: Full-stack execution from Figma to production. Modern tech stacks built for speed and maintainability.

integration.title: System Integration
integration.description: Connecting fragmented legacy systems, universal hardware integration, and IoT ecosystems.

cto.title: Interim CTO
cto.description: Strategic technical leadership, hiring roadmaps, and engineering culture for startups.

caseStudies.heading: Proven Results. Across Industries. At Scale.
caseStudies.subheading: A selection of enterprise projects and strategic technical interventions.

cxmapper.title: Omnichannel Communication Platform — 30+ Workflow Nodes, Git-Like Versioning
cxmapper.description: Built a SaaS platform for visual communication automation used by SulAmérica and Caixa Seguradora. Visual DAG workflow builder with 30+ node types, unique Git-like versioning system (branches, commits, PRs, approval gates), WhatsApp chatbot orchestrator, 4 template types, multi-tenant architecture with RBAC, and full observability. NestJS monolith consolidated from 20+ microservices.

resilion.title: Infrastructure Intelligence Platform — AI Copilot + IoT Sensor Network
resilion.description: Key contributor to the Resilion platform, working across multiple systems: helped build the Nexus backend (Hono + PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB), Sentinel monitoring dashboard (Next.js 15 + Mapbox + Three.js), AI Copilot (LangGraph with 15+ tools and intent classification), Ranger data collector agent, and Courier IoT gateway (protocol-agnostic FTP/SFTP/MQTT). Contributed to the design of a 6-model ML ensemble for predictive failure forecasting.

zurich.title: Document Processing: 12 Months → 2 Months — 6x Acceleration
zurich.description: Reengineered document processing through pipeline parallelization. Authored a full Solution Architecture Document with 8 ADRs, 82 business rules, 37 use cases, and 8 Bounded Contexts using DDD tactical patterns. Planned gradual migration using Strangler Fig Pattern with canary deployments and automatic rollback.

pocketbooks.title: 3 AI Pipelines — Recommendations, Retrospectives & Reading Plans
pocketbooks.description: Built three production AI pipelines: a two-phase LangGraph agent for reading plans (20-iteration tool-calling loops against Google Books API), a recommendation engine with recency-weighted context (GPT-4o, 7 candidates monthly), and a retrospective generator with 13 structured AI-generated text fields. All async via SQS, premium-gated, multi-language.

engineering.heading: Engineering Philosophy
engineering.description: Keep it simple. I don't pick architectures because they're trendy — I pick them because they solve the problem with the least complexity possible. A well-structured monolith beats a poorly designed microservices mess every time. DDD when the domain warrants it, event-driven when you actually need decoupling, and a straightforward API when that's all you need. The same pragmatism applies to AI: structured outputs, proper error handling, real data validation. The right solution matches your constraints, not the hype cycle.

products.heading: Products I've Built, Not Just Deployed

pocketbooks.subtitle: AI-Powered Reading Platform
pocketbooks.description: 3 production AI pipelines: LangGraph reading plan agent, GPT-4o book recommendation engine, and retrospective generator (like Spotify Wrapped for readers). NestJS backend, Stripe payments.

claudia.subtitle: Multi-Agent AI Assistant
claudia.description: CLI productivity assistant with LangGraph multi-agent architecture (Main, Planning, Summary agents). RAG knowledge base via Qdrant vector database. Google Calendar + Microsoft Calendar integrations.

cronock.subtitle: B2B2C Appointment Booking SaaS
cronock.description: Appointment booking platform for beauty and aesthetic services in Brazil. NestJS + PostgreSQL with DDD/Clean Architecture, React Native/Expo mobile app, MercadoPago payments.

articles.heading: I Share What I Learn
articles.subheading: Published writing on architecture, distributed systems, and engineering leadership.

about.heading: The Short Version
about.p1: I started coding at 12 with RPG Maker and building neural networks by 17. That curiosity turned into a career spanning enterprise architecture, AI engineering, and product development — building CxMapper for SulAmérica and Caixa Seguradora, contributing to an IoT intelligence platform with AI copilot at Koru, and reducing a 12-month document workflow to 2 months at Zurich Santander.
about.p2: Today I work with companies of all sizes — from startups to enterprises — who need someone to architect scalable systems, ship real features, and unblock their engineering teams. I also build my own products: Pocket Books (a reading platform with AI features), Cronock (a B2B2C booking SaaS), and ClaudIA (an open-source multi-agent assistant). The best engineers understand what it means to own something end-to-end.
about.credentials: MBA in Software Architecture (2025) · MBA in AI Engineering (2026) · Portuguese (native) · English (fluent)

contact.heading: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.description: I'm currently accepting new high-impact projects for 2026. Briefly describe your challenge and let's see if we're a fit.
